title: WORKSOURCE - 211info
text: SE WORKS HAROLD WORKSOURCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources to help unemployed and underemployed people find jobs, connect with the right employers, get training for in-demand careers, and meet the requirements for unemployment benefits through a network of public and private partners. Also, help businesses find skilled workers, grow their workforce, and access job training and pre-layoff support services. 8044 SE Harold Street Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 772-2300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 772-2300 Alternate (971) 432-5029 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Career Counseling Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers Computer Literacy Training Programs Job Development Job Finding Assistance Layoff Preparation Prejob Guidance Public Internet Access Sites Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - PROFESSIONAL IMMIGRANT CREDENTIAL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SE WORKS HAROLD
